expectations.text: profile-hook-created: profile edit 전용 훅이 hooks/utils/profile 경로에 생성된다 (예: hooks/utils/profile/useProfileEdit/index.ts)
expectations.evidence: File exists at hooks/utils/profile/useProfileEdit/index.ts and contains the useProfileEdit hook.

expectations.text: hook-use-prefix: 훅 이름이 use 접두사로 시작한다
hook-index-ts: 비 API 훅이 hooks/utils/{domain}/{hookName}/index.ts 패턴으로 생성된다
expectations.evidence: File is located at hooks/utils/profile/useProfileEdit/index.ts, matching the required pattern.

expectations.text: page-no-inline-usestate: page.tsx에 다수의 인라인 useState가 그대로 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx contains zero useState calls. All state is managed inside useProfileEdit hook.

expectations.text: page-section-layout: page에는 섹션 렌더링과 handler 연결만 남는다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx only destructures from useProfileEdit and renders sections (profile-view, profile-form) wired to handlers (handleEdit, handleCancel, handleSave, setDraftField). No state or business logic inline.

expectations.text: save-error-state: 저장 성공/에러 상태가 훅 반환값에 포함된다
expectations.evidence: UseProfileEditReturn interface includes 'saved: boolean' and 'errors: Record<string, string>', both returned from the hook (lines 21-22, 104-113).
Hook is defined as 'const useProfileEdit = (): UseProfileEditReturn => {' (line 32), which is an arrow function.

page.tsx retains data-testid attributes: profile-saved, profile-view, profile-display-name, profile-edit-btn, profile-form, profile-name, profile-bio, profile-save, profile-cancel. DatePicker and MultiSelect use testId props (profile-birthdate, profile-skills).
